description_long: This plant pot features a cylindrical white ceramic vessel partially encased in a dark, metallic holder with a prominent handle. The metal holder is adorned with embossed floral patterns, adding a decorative touch to its utilitarian form. The handle is robust and angular, suggesting ease of carrying or repositioning. The pot sits on a solid, slightly raised base, providing stability and a subtle separation from the ground. The white ceramic contrasts sharply with the dark metal, creating a visually striking appearance suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban settings. The interior is smooth and unadorned, optimized for holding soil and a small to medium plant.
description: A white ceramic plant pot encased in a dark, floral-embossed metal holder with a sturdy handle and raised base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the handle directly behind the pot, highlighting the floral-embossed metal holder and the clean cylindrical shape.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full profile of the handle and the asymmetrical height of the metal holder around the pot.
description_view_2: Back view displays the uninterrupted floral pattern on the metal holder and the absence of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the handle on the right, emphasizing the pot's smooth ceramic surface and the decorative metalwork.
attribute_placement_context: ideal for decorative use on urban balconies or patios
